name: Rugelach # 4
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Cream Cheese (or Philadelphia Light or No-Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the margarine, cream cheese, egg yolks (or egg beaters), sugar, vanilla extract, and salt until smooth.
2. Gradually add flour to the mixture and stir until a dough forms.
3. Form the dough into a ball and refrigerate for 1 hour.
4. Divide the dough into 4 equal parts.
5. Cut each part into wedges.
6. Fill each wedge with your desired filling (e.g., Polaner sugarless jam, chopped nuts, cinnamon).
7. Roll up each filled wedge tightly and cut into slices about 1/2 inch thick.
8. Place the rugelach on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or wax paper.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25-30 minutes until golden brown. Do not grease the baking sheet.
Filling Options:
- Polaner sugarless jam
- Chopped nuts and cinnamon (you can also roll the dough in chopped nuts without adding jam)
